steps.title: Use the spend pattern
steps.content: The sentence uses the pattern spent time doing something: the rover spent over fourteen years collecting data. The blank should therefore be a present participle that completes that phrase.

steps.title: Reject verb-form mismatches
steps.content: Choice A adds a finite verb after spent, which breaks the sentence. Choice C also uses a finite verb and does not agree with rover. Choice D uses a past participle where the doing form is needed. The answer is B.
